title: Crispy Chicken Zanzibari Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish made with crispy chicken, zanzibari sauce, and various vegetables.
instructions: 1. Heat the cooking oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and stir-fry until they are translucent.
3. Add the sliced bell peppers and carrots and continue stir-frying for another 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides.
5. Add the zanzibari sauce, soy sauce, and honey, and stir to coat the chicken and vegetables.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Garnish with crispy fried shallots and serve hot.
